tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: THE LONDON UNDERGROUND
tasks.text: The London Underground, 1.1. _________ is also known as the Tube, is the oldest underground railway system in the world. It 1.2. _________ opened in 1863, and at that time only a 1.3. _________ thousand passengers used it each day. Today, the Underground carries more 1.4. _________ five million passengers daily. The network consists 1.5. _________ eleven lines and 272 stations, covering over 400 kilometres of track. Many tourists who visit London 1.6. _________ the first time are surprised by 1.7. _________ large the system is. Travelling by Tube is often faster than going 1.8. _________ bus or car, especially during rush hour when the streets are full of traffic. 1.9. _________ of the most famous features of the Underground is its map, which was designed in 1931 and has 1.10. _________ copied by metro systems all around the world.
